summary: Push Notifications feature testing. Login works, home screen loads, all 5 tabs navigate correctly, settings shows notification toggle (OFF by default when no push_token), graceful handling on web (Device.isDevice=false). Backend health check passes. Expected console warning about expo-notifications on web is present but harmless.

react_native_issues.issue: Expected warning: '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web.' - this is expected behavior on web preview.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notifications feature working as expected. On web preview Device.isDevice=false so no push token is obtained (expected). Toggle starts OFF (no push_token in profile). Settings hint text shows 'Enable to get a daily check-in reminder.' when off. All 5 tabs working. Home shows active focus 'Build Website' (user may have multiple focuses). Backend /api/health returns 200.
